_meta.dataset: VERIFICATION + CORRECTIONS for all-cargo-class K1 (Табл.2), K3 (Табл.4), and per-род МВН (Табл.1). Closes H16/M12/M14/L8, underpins H2.
_meta.purpose: Cross-check live seed files (tr1-class-coeff.json, tr1-k1-full.json, tr1-k3-full.json, etsng-classes.json) against ТР-1 894/25 verbatim. Findings + corrected/expanded cells ONLY. Engine agent applies these to the live seeds. This file does NOT replace the live seeds.
_meta.law: Приказ ФАС России от 06.11.2025 N 894/25 (ТР-1 2026), рег. Минюст 22.12.2025 N 84708, в силе с 2026-01-01
primarySourcesFetched: https://sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/prilozhenie-n-1/prilozhenie-n-1_1/tablitsa-n-4/ (Табл.4 K3) — FETCHED verbatim 2026-06-09 (two independent passes, consistent)
_meta.antiFabricationPolicy: Every cell below either (a) reproduces a value already in a live seed and is marked CONFIRMED against the fetched primary source, or (b) is a correction/expansion copied verbatim from the fetched sudact source. No number is interpolated, guessed, or reconstructed. Cells not obtainable verbatim are marked confidence:red with the exact source location.

class2.note: Both live seeds carry class 2 = 1.0 flat. Matches Табл.2 verbatim. No correction.

class1_taper.note: Both live seeds carry all 21 rows identically and they match Табл.2 verbatim. Oracle-locked (699km=0.75, 2444km=0.68, 3108km=0.65). No correction.

class3_split.verdict: CONFIRMED — both seeds already correct, no correction needed
class3_split.verbatim_other_154: Остальные позиции грузов третьего тарифного класса -> 1,54
class3_split.positionByPositionCheck: The 1,74 named-position list in BOTH tr1-class-coeff.json (line 158) and tr1-k1-full.json (line 52) is BYTE-for-BYTE identical to the Табл.2 verbatim list fetched 2026-06-09. All ranges (312-316, 321-324, 331-333, 483-489, 711-713, 721-726, 751-754, 756-758) confirmed exactly. No position added, dropped, or shifted.
class3_split.remainingRisk: L8 RESIDUAL: Табл.2 lists ЕТСНГ POSITIONS (3-digit groups), but tariff classification maps a 6-digit ЕТСНГ code to class-3 via etsng-classes.json tariffClass field. The 1.74-vs-1.54 selection at runtime requires matching the 6-digit code's leading 3-digit position against the verbatim named-list. The list itself is verified correct; the runtime MATCHER (position-prefix containment incl. ranges like 483-489) is an engine concern, not a data defect. Flag for engine agent H2: implement range-aware position matching, NOT a flat class-3 coefficient.

task1_K1_classCoeff.byteIdenticalNote: tr1-class-coeff.json and tr1-k1-full.json classCoeff arrays are functionally byte-identical (L9 drift hazard noted in audit). Both verified correct here; recommend engine collapse to single source-of-truth file.

coal_directional_split.verdict: CORRECTED + EXPANDED — seed was incomplete (M12). Live seed had only 161024/161039->0.895 and 161016/161132->1.05; full subcode lists + directional rule now sourced verbatim.

verbatim_row_domestic.name: Уголь каменный
verbatim_row_domestic.directionQualifier: 0,895 — за исключением перевозки в направлении сухопутных пограничных переходов и припортовых станций железных дорог Российской Федерации, имеющих экспортный код
verbatim_row_domestic.meaning: DOMESTIC directions get 0,895; BUT if any of these codes is shipped toward a land border crossing OR a port station with export code, the export coefficient (1,05) applies instead. The split is DIRECTION-DEPENDENT, not purely code-dependent.

verbatim_row_export.name: Уголь каменный
verbatim_row_export.directionQualifier: экспортные направления / коды с экспортным признаком — 1,05

coal_directional_split.correctionForSeed: Replace tr1-k3-full.json class1 rows for 161024/161039 (0.895) and 161016/161132 (1.05) with the two FULL verbatim subcode lists above. ALSO add a directional flag: 0,895 codes flip to 1,05 when destination is a land border crossing or export-coded port station (требует direction-aware lookup in engine — flag for engine agent).
coal_directional_split.engineNote_H2_M12: Coal pricing needs a DIRECTION input (export-port/land-border vs domestic), not just an ЕТСНГ code. Until that input exists, coal toward ambiguous destinations should return confidence:yellow (cannot decide 0.895 vs 1.05 without direction).

task3_MVN_perRod.scope: Identify which ЕТСНГ codes need цистерна/контейнер/transporter/рефрижератор-specific МВН; document the per-род МВН rule from source; resolve М14 6 codes with absent МВН.

structuralFinding.verdict: CONFIRMED — the default+пл collapse is STRUCTURALLY CORRECT for Табл.1, NOT a defect requiring per-род expansion
structuralFinding.explanation: ТР-1 Приложение N1 Таблица N 1 (МВН — минимальная весовая норма) publishes ONE МВН per ЕТСНГ position for the UNIVERSAL wagon (полувагон/крытый), with an optional separate ПЛ (платформа) value when the cargo also moves on platforms (e.g. coal 'Г/П,ПЛ-46' = г/п в полувагоне, 46т на платформе). etsng-classes.json correctly captures exactly these two slots: mvnByWagon.default (universal wagon) + optional mvnByWagon.пл (platform). Frequency: default present on 4994/5036 rows, пл on 369 rows.
structuralFinding.whyNoCistern_container_specific_MVN: МВН (weight floor per п.18.2) applies to schemes N8/N8(1)/И1 — universal wagon per-wagon-by-mass pricing. It does NOT apply to: (a) ЦИСТЕРНА/наливные (schemes N19-24, И14-И18) which price ЗА 1 ТОННУ × масса with their OWN weight minimums (e.g. 22т per п.21.4) embedded in the naliv rules, NOT in Табл.1 МВН; (b) КОНТЕЙНЕРЫ (schemes N85-94) which price PER CONTAINER UNIT (per-size), so no per-tonne МВН floor; (c) TRANSPORTER/сцеп (schemes N39+) priced per-axle. So there is NO per-род МВН to differentiate in Табл.1 for these — their weight/unit floors live in the род-specific scheme rules, not the Табл.1 МВН column.
structuralFinding.h16_resolution: H16/audit-item-9 'МВН collapsed to default+пл, no цистерна/контейнер differentiation' is NOT a data gap in Табл.1 — it correctly reflects the single-МВН-per-position source structure. The цистерна/контейнер/transporter weight floors are a SEPARATE concern (naliv per-ton minimum, container per-unit) that belongs to the род-specific scheme belt tables (H6/H17), not the ЕТСНГ МВН registry. Recommend reclassifying H16 from 'МВН precision gap' to 'documented-correct'.
structuralFinding.perRodMVN_rule_verbatim: п.18.2: «Тариф ... по тарифным схемам N N И1, 8, 8(1) рассчитывается за общую массу груза в универсальном вагоне, но не менее МВН, установленной для соответствующих грузов и приведенной в таблице N 1 ... в зависимости от тарифного класса груза.» — i.e. МВН is keyed by (ЕТСНГ position, tariff class), for the UNIVERSAL wagon. Platform variant is the secondary published column. No separate цистерна/контейнер МВН column exists in Табл.1.

m14_sixCodes_absentMVN.verdict: CONFIRMED ABSENT in source — these are genuinely non-mass-priced positions, correctly null

421231.name: ВАГОНЫ, ПЕРЕВОЗИМЫЕ НА СВОИХ ОСЯХ, СЛЕДУЮЩИЕ ДЛЯ СДАЧИ В МЕТАЛЛОЛОМ, ИСКЛЮЧЕННЫЕ ИЗ АБД ПВ

421246.name: ВАГОНЫ, ПЕРЕВОЗИМЫЕ НА СВОИХ ОСЯХ, СЛЕДУЮЩИЕ НА ПРОДАЖУ

422060.name: ЛОКОМОТИВЫ ПРИВАТНЫЕ С ЛОКОМОТИВНОЙ БРИГАДОЙ ... С СОБСТВЕННОЙ ТЯГОЙ

694056.name: Сырье из переработки ТКО для альтернативного топлива (RDF)

m14_sixCodes_absentMVN.analysis: TWO distinct reasons for absent МВН: (1) 421231/421246/422060 are ROLLING STOCK moving on their own axles (вагоны/локомотивы на своих осях) — priced by a SEPARATE scheme (подвижной состав на своих осях, per-axle/per-unit), so a per-mass МВН is correctly inapplicable; the 42xxxx-on-own-axles family (~15 rows incl. 421000/421015/...) all carry mvnRaw '0'/null by design. (2) 694041/694056/694060 are ТКО/RDF (твердые коммунальные отходы / refuse-derived fuel) — these are NEW/recent ЕТСНГ positions where Табл.1 simply does not yet publish an МВН.

engineGuidance.rollingStock_421_422: DO NOT block on null МВН; route to the per-axle/per-unit подвижной-состав scheme. If that scheme is not implemented, return confidence:red 'нет тарифной схемы для подвижного состава на своих осях' — NEVER a fabricated mass.
engineGuidance.tko_rdf_694: 694041/694056/694060: МВН genuinely absent in Табл.1. Engine MUST return confidence:red for any per-mass (N8) quote on these codes (cannot apply п.18.2 weight floor without МВН). Mark explicitly, do not default to a neighboring code's МВН.
engineGuidance.redReason: МВН physically absent in primary source for these 6 codes (and the wider 42xxxx-on-axles family). This is a CORRECT red, not a missing-data error — the engine must surface red, not guess.
engineGuidance.sourceToObtain: https://sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/prilozhenie-n-1/prilozhenie-n-1_1/tablitsa-n-1/ — confirm 694041/694056/694060 have no МВН row (expected absent). For 421/422 на своих осях, the applicable scheme is the подвижной-состав-на-своих-осях tariff, not Табл.1 МВН.

etsng151_anomalies_L11.note: Audit L11: ПЛ-0 anomaly on 694018 ('40,ПЛ-0' -> пл:0); casing 'г/п' vs 'Г/П' on 151183. These are MVN-registry normalization issues, low severity.
